rationale: To optimize the Hierarchical Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model, we will increase the embedding dimension and the number of experts per group. This should allow the model to capture more complex patterns in the data and improve its overall performance. We will also introduce a router temperature to help the model learn more effective routing strategies.

To further optimize the Hierarchical Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model, we will increase the number of groups and the number of layers. This should allow the model to capture more complex patterns in the data and improve its overall performance. We will also decrease the dropout rate to reduce overfitting and introduce more experts per group to increase the model's capacity.
